timeline.text: Now tracking as Jaipur's top developing story: Rajasthan: Police arrest accused in Alwar petrol pump shooting case; probe reveals planned attack.

lead.headline: Rajasthan: Police arrest accused in Alwar petrol pump shooting case; probe reveals planned attack
lead.analysis:
Rajasthan: Police arrest accused in Alwar petrol pump shooting case; probe reveals planned attack is the most widely reported story across Jaipur feeds right now, carried by ANI News (1 report(s) in the last day).

Also being reported today: Jaipur murder case: Did Ayushi Sharma kill her father too? Uncle’s claim now under police probe; Surat Latest News Today on July 11th, 2026: Flood Toll Rises, Relief Efforts & New Projects; Bikaner: Protest Against Proposed UGC Bill #Gallery.

sources.title: Rajasthan: Police arrest accused in Alwar petrol pump shooting case; probe reveals planned attack
